title: Jina Embeddings v2

defines.name: Jina Embeddings v2
defines.definition: An open-source text embedding model that extends BERT with bidirectional ALiBi to encode sequences up to 8192 tokens for high-quality document embeddings.

problem: Existing embedding models, especially BERT-based ones, cannot represent long documents well and often require truncation or chunking, which hurts semantics and increases memory and search costs.
